response: the sacred verses of siriaraghu mahala 3 speak of the spirit of devotion and the power of the guru's grace - the true path of devotion can only be walked with the guidance of the guru - without the guru's blessing the path of devotion cannot be found - the soul must merge with the self and understand the truth - in this way the soul becomes pure - the true word of the divine is the sacred language that brings the soul closer to the divine - the gene of devotion is passed on through the sacred teachings - the visit to the guru is essential for spiritual growth - the divine is the true friend and guide - the soul finds peace and understanding through the guru's grace - the divine is the source of all knowledge and wisdom - the language of the soul is the sacred word that connects with the divine - the spirit of the devotee is awakened through the guru's blessings - the visit to the guru is a journey of self-discovery and enlightenment - the divine is the light that guides the soul through darkness - the sacred language of the guru is the path to spiritual fulfillment - the spirit of the devotee is strengthened through the guru's grace - the visit to the guru is the key to inner peace and happiness - the divine is the true friend and guide - the gene of devotion is passed on through the sacred teachings - the language of the soul is the sacred word that connects with the divine - the spirit of the devotee is awakened through the guru's blessings - the visit to the guru is a journey of self-discovery and enlightenment - the divine is the light that guides the soul through darkness - the divine is the true friend and guide - the gene of devotion is passed on through the sacred teachings - the language of the soul is the sacred word that connects with the divine - the spirit of the devotee is awakened through the guru's blessings - the visit to the guru is a journey of self-discovery and enlightenment - the divine is the light that guides the soul through darkness - the sacred language of the guru is the path to spiritual fulfillment - the spirit of the devotee is strengthened through the guru's grace - the visit to the guru is the key to inner peace and happiness - the divine is the true friend and guide - the gene of devotion is passed on through the sacred teachings - the language of the soul is the sacred
